Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT eiaid_weights.eiaid AS eiaid, bs."in.state" AS state, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight * eiaid_weights.weight) AS units_count 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs JOIN eiaid_weights ON bs."in.county" = eiaid_weights.gisjoin 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND eiaid_weights.eiaid IN ('4110', '14328') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/4ca546b1401c16561d8d2dbd1248eb60451bd5a77d600ea3e0754b12f21f7a36/b76c0179-0d70-45da-85e2-b763a1934238/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
